frames.name: Constitutional Due Process Frame
frames.description: Presents the story as a constitutional law issue focused on due process rights and judicial oversight of executive power
frames.emphasis: Legal principles, constitutional protections, and the requirement for proper notice and opportunity to challenge deportations

frames.name: Judicial Activism Frame
frames.description: Frames the ruling as partisan judicial interference with legitimate immigration enforcement by emphasizing the judge's political appointment
frames.emphasis: Judge's appointment by Biden, characterization as 'activist judge,' and impact on Trump administration policies

frames.name: Immigration Enforcement Frame
frames.description: Focuses on the practical impact on deportation operations and national security concerns
frames.emphasis: Criminal records of deportees, countries accepting removals, and enforcement challenges

frames.name: Humanitarian Protection Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes protection from persecution and torture in third countries
frames.emphasis: Risk of persecution or torture, migrants' rights to seek protection, and safety concerns

outlierPerspectives: Daily Wire's detailed breakdown of the judge's specific constitutional reasoning and extensive direct quotes from the 81-page ruling
Fox Politics' inclusion of historical context about Biden's immigration policies and their alleged role in creating the current situation
Daily Wire's mention of the Supreme Court's previous June ruling that temporarily allowed the policy to continue
missingContext: Details about the specific legal standards or precedents the judge applied in making the constitutional determination
Information about how third-country deportation agreements are negotiated and what safeguards they typically include
Comparative analysis of how similar policies have been handled by previous administrations
Specific numbers of people affected by the policy or currently in deportation proceedings
Details about the class-action lawsuit plaintiffs and their specific circumstances
Information about the appeals process timeline and likelihood of Supreme Court review
